title: AWS Community Builder (Machine Learning)
description: The AWS Community Builders program offers technical resources, mentorship, and networking opportunities to AWS technical enthusiasts and emerging thought leaders. Active contributor since Q1 2022.

title: AWS Machine Learning Engineer Scholarship
description: Completed the AWS Machine Learning Engineer Scholarship Foundation Course with a Gold Badge.

title: World Bank ETHOS Graduate
description: Completed the ETHOS ICT entrepreneurship training program by The World Bank Group in association with SUNY Korea and NIPA. This 21-day program, held at the SUNY Korea Campus, included intensive sessions and tours of the Korean IT Industry and government agencies promoting ICT.

title: Contact Center Association of Malaysia Award
description: CCAM Bronze Award for excellence in the Malaysian National Contact Center Industry.

title: Shaheed Ziaur Rahman ICT Scholarship
description: National ICT Award received from the Honorable Prime Minister Begum Khaleda Zia in September 2004.
